title: Route Planner
subtitle: Range check based on your personal consumption curve. An honest forecast with disclosed assumptions — no guarantee, no charging-stop planning (coming in a later version).

form.capacityHintDerived: Derived from current range and SoC — adjust if needed.
form.capacityHintDefault: Could not be derived from vehicle data — default value, please check.
form.historyHint: Only {count, plural, one {# drive} other {# drives}} in history — base value not yet very reliable.
form.routingDefaultHint: public OSRM demo server — set up your own server via OSRM_URL.

errors.missingDestAddress: Please select a destination from the address search.
errors.socRange: Start SoC must be between 0 and 100.
errors.tempInvalid: Please enter a valid outside temperature.
errors.capacityRange: Battery capacity must be between 5 and 250 kWh.
errors.routingUnreachable: Routing service unreachable (timeout or network error). Please try again later.
errors.routingRateLimited: The public OSRM demo server rejected the request (rate limit). Please try again later or set up your own server via OSRM_URL.
errors.routingBadResponse: Unexpected response from the routing service.
errors.routingNoRoute: No route could be calculated for the start and destination. Please choose different points.

result.lowArrivalHint: The predicted arrival SoC is low — a charging stop is required. Automatic charging-stop planning is coming in a later version.

assumptions.speedAdjustmentDesc: {planned} km/h planned vs. ~{reference} km/h historical → factor {factor}
assumptions.footer: Experimental forecast based on assumptions (driving style, wind, load, tires, and climate control are not accounted for). Plan a reserve.
